Week 6 | Assignment: Compare and Contrast - Final Essay

Compare and Contrast Final Essay
Introduction
Due by the end of the week.

Use the topic you chose in the Week 4 assignment to submit a completed and polished compare-and-contrast essay. Using what you have learned regarding essay development, revise, edit, and polish your compare-and-contrast essay. Your essay should be a minimum of four to five paragraphs, 500-800 words, and at most four pages, not including your title page and reference section.
